title: Fattoush salad
description: A traditional Middle Eastern salad made with fresh vegetables, crispy toasted pita bread, and a tangy sumac dressing.

title: Vegetable salad
description: A refreshing blend of crisp seasonal vegetables, lightly seasoned and served with a zesty dressing.

title: Egg vegi salad
description: A wholesome mix of fresh garden vegetables and perfectly boiled eggs, tossed with a light and creamy dressing.
